metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2687
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Summary: Enriched environment triggers structural synaptic plasticity in the hippocampus that requires beta-adducin.

Fig.2: "Enhanced Synapse Turnover in Mature Organotypic Slice Cultures Lacking β-Adducin"
- "By contrast, β-Adducin-/- LMTs exhibited dramatic remodeling of filopodia and satellites (Figures 2A and 2B), suggesting enhanced synapse turnover in the absence of β-Adducin....reintroduction of GFP-β-Adducin into granule cells restored the stability of satellites and filopodia at LMTs of transduced neurons (Figure 2B)."
- "we monitored spine turnover in the stratum radiatum of hippocampal CA1 in mature wild-type and β-Adducin-/- slice cultures. In the absence of β-Adducin, spine gains and losses were more than twice as frequent as in wild-type cultures (Figures 2C and 2D)" ..."we reintroduced the protein into CA1. The GFP-β-Adducin construct ...completely restored spine stability (Figure 2D)."

Fig.3: "Specific Increase in AZ Lability, but No Alterations in Synapse Numbers in β-Adducin-/- Mice Housed under Control Conditions"

Fig.4: "Synapse Disassembly in Enriched Mice Depends on phosphorylation of β-Adducin Involving PKC"

Fig.5: "Failure to Increase Synapse, but Not Thorn Numbers at LMTs upon Enrichment in Mice Lacking β-Adducin"

Fig.6: "Failure to Increase Synapse, but Not Spine Numbers in CA1 upon Enrichment in Mice Lacking β-Adducin"

Model: Fig.8 "Relationship between Learning, Environmental Enrichment, and Connectivity Rearrangements in the Adult"

Discussion: "We have shown that mice lacking β-Adducin have a specific deficit to assemble new synapses under conditions of enhanced plasticity"

Note: I did not select the "regulation of..." version of the 'synapse assembly (GO:0007416)' term because of the known role of beta-adducin as a F-actin capping protein.. Experimental description: - "β-Adducin-/- mice (B6.129-β-Adducintm1Feb/Ibcm; Gilligan et al., 1999) were generously provided ..."
